_comment: Claude Desktop MCP config for EduBot. Copy to your OS-specific location, fill placeholders, restart Claude Desktop. macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json | Windows: %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json | Linux: ~/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json

obsidian._comment: Gives Claude read/write on your Obsidian vault. Requires the Local REST API plugin inside Obsidian to be enabled and running.
obsidian._alt_command_note: If 'mcp-obsidian' isn't on your PATH, use the full path. macOS with uv: /Users/YOU/.local/bin/mcp-obsidian. Windows with pip: %APPDATA%\Python\Scripts\mcp-obsidian.exe. Find it with: which mcp-obsidian (mac/linux) or where mcp-obsidian (Windows)

github._comment: Read/write GitHub issues, PRs, files. You already have this from Claude mobile — keep the token same.
